heading: 6 August 2025 Release
body:
- Adds a total namespaces count to the Catalog cluster
  metric that displays the total number of collections and indexes
  across all non-system databases, and adds a new [default alert](default-alert-settings) that warns users when [Total Namespaces is](<Total Namespaces is>)
  over 10,000.

- Makes the ability to [metrics integration with Prometheus](prometheus-integration) an opt-in feature.
